text: hey babe, you home for dinner tonight or should I just sort myself out?
yeah be back by 7ish, was thinking we could do that Thai place finally? 😊
yes!! booking it now, 7:30 ok?
Hey love, just checking in — haven't heard from you in a few days. Everything okay? 💛
Sorry Mum, been flat out with work. I'm good though, just tired. How are you feeling?
Relieved to hear! I'm fine, just miss you. Come for dinner Sunday if you can, I'll make your favourite x
Hey sweetheart, just checking in. Haven't heard from you in a few days, everything okay?
Sorry dad, been slammed with work. I'm good though! How are you and mum?
We're fine, don't worry about us. Just miss you. Come round for dinner soon yeah?
ok so friday - are we actually doing the wine thing or are you gonna bail on me again lol
I WOULD NEVER 😭 yes obviously!! come to mine at 7? I'll grab a bottle of that rosé you liked
done!! bringing snacks don't argue with me
Joan! We're coming up to Galway the weekend of the 25th — are you around? Would love to see you and Colin if you're free.
Amy!! Yes, that weekend works perfectly — we'd love to see you both. Dinner Saturday? I'll book somewhere good.
Saturday dinner is perfect! Owen says he'll drive so we can actually enjoy a glass of wine for once 🥂
Joan!! it's been ages, how've you been? feels like forever since we last hung out 😅
I know right!! been absolutely manic with work tbh but finally getting a breather. you still living in the same place?
yeah same spot lol, we need to actually plan something soon, none of this 'we should catch up' and never do 😂
Kai for coffee tomorrow morning before your run? 8am?
Yes please. I'll be ravenous after Prom loop.
Bringing the coeliac scones — they're doing them again this week.
You're my favourite. See you at 8.
Also — house viewing Salthill Saturday 2pm confirmed.
Perfect. AIB documents are in the folder if you want to look tonight.
On it. What's the walk-through order? Kitchen first?
Kitchen + sea light. Then storage. Then boiler.
Achill Feb 13-15 — Renvyle House booked. Confirmation email in.
Yes 🙌 Diary marked. Off-call that whole weekend.
Christmas Eve, are we heading to Clifden after school breaks up 22nd?
22nd evening. Owen said they're arriving 23rd afternoon.
Fine. Bringing wine and Sheridan's cheese for Mam.
She'll be thrilled. Pat too.
The plumber said the new fittings arrive Thursday. Bathroom refit still on track.
Grand. Anything you need me to pick up from Galway before I come up?
A bag of that flour I like from McCambridge's if you're in town.
Done. In the boot for you.
Christmas week bookings — 9 rooms, big group from Cork on the 27th.
Amazing. Full house. I'll help with the breakfasts if I'm off.
Nina's mother rang about the wedding hair — needs your number.
Pass it on, of course.
Are you calling Sunday at 6? Dad wants to hear about NUIG.
Yes, 6 sharp. Tell him I've the final thesis structure to walk through.
Save the date confirmed — 22 August, Ballynahinch. Menus went out today.
So excited. Colin and I picked our menu last night — sea bass for me, lamb for him.
Perfect. Hens weekend Kilkenny 4-5 July, Saturday brunch at Kilkenny Design Centre.
Diary blocked. I'll book the train Friday evening.
Kai Saturday? Need to talk seating chart.
10:30, usual spot. Bring the spreadsheet.
You're the only person who calls it a spreadsheet.
Because it IS a spreadsheet 😂
Rehearsal dinner is Friday 21st at Kylemore. You + Colin down for it?
Yes. Both of us. Room booked at Kylemore already.
Antenatal pathway v5 draft ready for peer review — I've sent it to your NUIG email.
Thanks. I'll read tonight after Tyler + Oscar are in bed.
Also — HSE brief response is due Friday 5pm. Roisin drafting cover letter.
I can turn the evidence appendix around by Thursday 6pm.
Grand. BC WG steering meeting confirmed 8 Oct, 2pm, Cathal chairing.
Confirmed. I'll be there in person.
Rota conflict Thu 5 Dec — I need to swap the on-call block. Are you free?
Let me check the counselling calendar. Back to you in 15.
Yes I can take it. Consider swapped.
Legend. I owe you a proper coffee. Kai next week?
Deal.
Client N — postnatal day 5, calling in, sounds anxious about feeding. Home visit?
Yes. I've got a slot 2pm today, will call her direct now.
Thanks. Notes are in the shared drive under her code.
Pulled them up. Talk after.
Clinic room 2 double-booked next Monday — antenatal + smear? Can you cover one?
I'll take the antenatal in room 4. Send me the list.
Sent. Thanks Joan.
Wednesday 5pm still works this week?
Yes. Looking forward to it. Last few weeks were heavy.
Understood. See you Wednesday.
Ram lamb is at the vet Friday — going to Athenry mart Saturday. Owen coming.
Ok Dad. Let me know how the count goes.
Cathal's minutes from Sept meeting are up. Steering meeting is confirmed 8 Oct.
Read the minutes on the drive up to Clifden. I've comments on point 4.
Bring them. Costed model due mid-November.
Already on the list.
Transfer protocol v6 is up — comments window closes Fri.
Comments in tonight. I've got two clinical scenarios to add to Section 3.
Doula pilot Q3 review — can you send the caseload numbers before Wed?
Yes. Draft table with me tomorrow AM.
GP referral pathway v4 slides — happy for you to present at MDT?
Yes. I'll open with the community intake data.
PHN handover memo — sign off needed by Fri. Draft ok with you?
Sending sign-off tonight, one wording change in Section 2.
Advanced NRP sim Wed — you leading the airway station?
Yes. Case pack ready. See you 09:30.
Peer supervision Thursday 5pm — Salthill clinic room 3?
Confirmed.
Kai next Sat, 11? Been meaning to catch up properly.
Yes yes yes. Table's ours.
Will bring the reading list. Robinson's new one is up.
Already ordered.
Kai for coffee tomorrow morning before your run? 8am?
The plumber said the new fittings arrive Thursday. Bathroom refit still on track.
Save the date confirmed — 22 August, Ballynahinch. Menus went out today.
Antenatal pathway v5 draft ready for peer review.
Rota conflict Thu 5 Dec — I need to swap the on-call block.
Client N — postnatal day 5, calling in, sounds anxious about feeding.
Clinic room 2 double-booked next Monday.
Wednesday 5pm still works this week?
Ram lamb is at the vet Friday.
Cathal's minutes from Sept meeting are up.
Transfer protocol v6 is up.
Doula pilot Q3 review — can you send the caseload numbers?
GP referral pathway v4 slides — happy for you to present?
PHN handover memo — sign off needed by Fri.
Advanced NRP sim Wed — you leading the airway station?
Peer supervision Thursday 5pm — Salthill clinic room 3?
Kai next Sat, 11? Been meaning to catch up properly.
Fiona's 6th birthday June 20 — small gathering at ours. You + Colin free?
Yes. Diary blocked.
Oscar's asking when Auntie Joan next visits. He's obsessed with your stethoscope.
Tell him next Sunday. Bringing him a play one 🩺
Wiring at Mam's B&B done. Bill going out Friday.
Grand. Christmas week rooms all sorted?
Yeah. Fitted new smokes in every room while I was at it.
Legend.
Museum shop is quiet this week — you around for lunch Thursday?
Home visits Thursday but Friday I can. Kai 12:30?
Perfect. Bringing baby photos from the album — Mam sent them up.
Also — flowers. Am I mad to want dahlias in August?
Not mad. Ballynahinch's florist grows them. Ask her.
Long weekend Achill playlist — Bon Iver okay to keep? I know you know all the words.
Bon Iver first, Fleet Foxes second, Iron & Wine third. Non-negotiable.
Dad wants to know if you're bringing the guitar at Christmas.
Yes. And Colin's bringing the whiskey.
PN Pathway HSE presentation slot confirmed — 15 Dec, 11am, HSE West Boardroom.
Marked. I'll do the walkthrough with you Wed before.
Costed model — CFO wants to see it 12 Nov. Can you draft the finance annex?
Yes. Draft with you 10 Nov end of day.
MDT case list for Wed is heavier than usual. Coffee before?
Yes. 8:30 in the canteen.
